calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-25-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-25-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
Alan Horwitz, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Archstone Communities Incorporated.
Michael Croak, general manager for plaintiff Archstone Communities Incorporated, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Jeffrey Kane.

The plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Apartment Lease Agreement dated 01/26/07--------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Notice to Pay Rent or Quit dated 01/07/08-------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Proof of Service of Notice to Pay Rent
or Quit dated 01/07/08--------------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Archstone Communities Incorporated and against defendant JEFFREY KANE as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover from defendant JEFFREY KANE Rent and Per Diem in the sum of $3,830.00, Costs in the amount of $280.00, for a total judgment of $4,110.00.
Plaintiff Archstone Communities Incorporated is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1390 Market Street, Apartment #1507, San Francisco, CA 94102. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
